Name: sapdme_numbering
Title: Identifiers
ShortText: Create identifiers for the specified event at a plant.
Description:
Manage identifiers for the specified event at a plant. Creating Identifiers is synonymous to Get Next Number.
 For more information please refer the below link. 
 [Manage Next Numbers](https://help.sap.com/viewer/97c9e9b9fac74be2a023638cd1700b46/latest/en-US/2dd9a2c31a7d4b788a7bc0e16227bb4e.html)
